creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon Dec  9 19:31:10 2013
New Revision: 336024
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336024

Log:
  - Update to 1.04
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Test-Number-Delta/Changes
  PR:		ports/184186
  Submitted by:	sunpoet (myself)
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout, 16 days)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/Makefile	Mon Dec  9 19:31:04 2013	(r336023)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-Number-Delta/Makefile	Mon Dec  9 19:31:10 2013	(r336024)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Test-Number-Delta
-PORTVERSION=	1.03
+PORTVERSION=	1.04
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,10 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	tjs@cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	Compare the difference between two numbers within a specified amount
 
+LICENSE=	AL2
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=	Test::Number::Delta.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

 %%SITE_PERL%%/Test/Number/Delta.pm
